title: Verify user can successfully reset their forgotten password
description: Tests the complete password reset flow, from requesting a reset link to setting a new password and logging in with it.
preconditions: A registered and verified user account exists.
User can access the account's email inbox.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the login page and click 'Forgot Password'.
2. Enter the registered email address and click 'Send Reset Link'.
3. Check the email inbox for the password reset email.
4. Click the reset link within 1 hour.
5. On the reset page, enter a new password that meets security criteria and is not one of the last 5 used.
8. Log in with the email and the new password.

expected_result: The password is successfully updated. The user is redirected to the login page and can log in with the new password. All previous active sessions for this user are invalidated.
